The '''Keitumite Mutual Military Treaty''' was a treaty signed by representatives from seven [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] and the [[Keitumite]]s, prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The Military Treaty joined the worlds in both commerce and defense. While the treaty had never actually been invoked, it remained in force during the years following the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]] attempted to force [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]—hoping that the others, bound by their respective treaties, would follow suit, and thus add more planets and [[Star system/Legends|systems]] to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] cause.
